title: Object Negotiations
description: Four independent commercial concept images where everyday objects conduct tense boardroom negotiations in different rooms and lighting conditions.
creative_direction: Independent ad-grade studies for Object Boardroom: each image uses a different object, room mood, and business scenario while keeping the anthropomorphism photorealistic rather than cartoonish.

en.title: Object Negotiations
en.description: Four independent commercial concept images where everyday objects conduct tense boardroom negotiations in different rooms and lighting conditions.

zh-CN.title: 物体谈判单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立广告概念图,让日常物体在不同会议室和光线条件下进行紧张谈判。
